name: branchline
description: Evidence-led, read-only release rehearsal for Git changes.

interface.shortDescription: Rehearse release risk from a real Git diff.
interface.longDescription: Turn committed Git evidence into an auditable rollout decision, deterministic mitigations, and an explicit human approval gate.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Branchline to analyze this release candidate. Separate observed evidence from assumptions, propose a rollout path, and keep the final decision with me.
